# Pull Request

## What
Describe the change and why it’s needed.

## How to test
- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` (if present)
- [ ] `npm test` (if present)
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed.
- [ ] This PR does not include secrets or real credentials.
- [ ] CI is green.

## Screenshots (UI changes)
If applicable, include before/after screenshots.
